# Nomicous

> AI-assisted annotation platform for historical manuscripts. Models draft segments and transcriptions. Researchers review and edit. Open HTR models on Hugging Face. Part of the NOMOS research ecosystem.

Nomicous is open research tooling for manuscript HTR workflows: page annotation, model-assisted transcription, local or cloud inference, and export of training-ready line data.

## Site

- [Home](https://nomicous.com/): Product overview, features, and published models
- [App](https://app.nomicous.com/): Hosted annotation platform
- [llms.txt](https://nomicous.com/llms.txt): This file

## Models

- [syriac-htr-calamari](https://huggingface.co/kkkamur07/syriac-htr-calamari): Syriac line HTR (Calamari), published
- coptic-htr-calamari: Coptic line HTR (Calamari), coming soon
- armenian-htr-calamari: Armenian line HTR (Calamari), coming soon
- Datasets: training and evaluation sets on Hugging Face, coming soon
- [Author models on Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/kkkamur07): Published checkpoints

## Project

- [NOMOS project](https://nomosproject.de): Research context for Nomicous

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://nomicous.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable page list
